description:
The Next-Gen Collaboration Suite

Lark is a next-generation office suite that integrates messaging, schedule management, collaborative documents, video conferencing, and many more applications in a single platform.
Base
- In Base, you can view linked data from one-way/two-way link fields in grid view on a record’s details page. Here, you can easily add, delete, or modify fields and records of the source table, or unlink records, simplifying data reviews and boosting efficiency.
